ReadBoundary: Read all action log rows needed for audit, status, and suggestions.
WriteBoundary: Create suggested, dry-run, verification, and completed-action rows.
ApprovalGate: G1 proposals may be logged; G2 completed internal writes need named approval.
GraduationRule: Required for every later adapter lane.

ReadBoundary: Read prior governance, app posture, and operating decisions.
WriteBoundary: Record approved decisions only; never infer approval from context.
ApprovalGate: Adam approval required before decision write.
EvidenceTarget: Decision Register and Agent Action Log
GraduationRule: Required before new app, consent, permission, sharing, or external-send posture.

ReadBoundary: Read intake, workspace, handoff, tool review, automation backlog, exceptions, readiness, and CRM records.
WriteBoundary: Create/update internal records only after approval; no real client commitments without review.
EvidenceTarget: Agent Action Log plus target List item link
GraduationRule: Stage 8D dummy path must be captured before broader internal writes.

SourceOfTruth: CRM Lists in Guided AI Labs SharePoint
ReadBoundary: Read organizations, contacts, engagements, stakeholders, touchpoints, lifecycle, actions, qualification, notes, artifacts, and health.
WriteBoundary: Create/update internal relationship records and follow-ups after approval; do not create external commitments.
EvidenceTarget: Agent Action Log plus CRM item link
GraduationRule: CRM command center and Stage 8D walkthrough must be usable by Adam.

ReadBoundary: Read tasks and bucket state for coordination.
WriteBoundary: Create/update supervised internal tasks only; no calendar/deadline commitment without approval.
EvidenceTarget: Agent Action Log plus task link or title
GraduationRule: Remain delegated/supervised until a narrower app posture is approved.

ReadBoundary: Read approved evidence, methods, handoff packets, and readiness materials.
WriteBoundary: Create folders/files only in approved workspace paths; no permission/share changes.
ApprovalGate: Internal file creation G2; sharing/permission changes G3.
EvidenceTarget: Agent Action Log plus file/folder link
GraduationRule: Selected permissions design must be approved before app-based writes.

ReadBoundary: Read approved support mailbox metadata and message bodies only after support MFA/access posture is complete.
WriteBoundary: Create draft replies only; sending remains approval-gated.
ApprovalGate: Draft G2 after approval; external send G3 after explicit review.
EvidenceTarget: Support Register and Agent Action Log
GraduationRule: Support MFA and Exchange Application RBAC design must be complete before app-based access.

ReadBoundary: Read approved channel context for coordination summaries.
WriteBoundary: Post internal summaries only after approval; no broad announcements or guest-impacting posts.
ApprovalGate: Internal channel post G2; broad/external-sensitive post G3.
EvidenceTarget: Agent Action Log plus channel/post link when available
GraduationRule: Keep manual/supervised until posting etiquette and channel scope are reviewed.

ReadBoundary: Read approved form schema and response routing evidence.
WriteBoundary: Propose form/flow updates locally; public/client-facing publishing requires approval.
EvidenceTarget: Decision Register and Agent Action Log
GraduationRule: No public/client form publishing until Stage 8D and access decisions are reviewed.

Surface: Entra app registrations and enterprise apps
ReadBoundary: Read app ownership, permissions, consent posture, and sign-in/audit evidence.
WriteBoundary: No default writes. App creation, consent, permission grants, and tenant policy changes require separate approval-gated operators.
ApprovalGate: Decision Register approval and typed approval phrase.
EvidenceTarget: Decision Register, Agent Action Log, and inventory transcript
GraduationRule: Must not reuse broad setup helper grants as production bridge capability.
